issues.info: Having an issue with the mod?

disable-daily-button.name: Disable Daily Button
disable-daily-button.description: Disable the small green 'Set Daily' button appearing in the interface allowing you to set the level for daily easily

disable-weekly-button.name: Disable Weekly Button
disable-weekly-button.description: Disable the small green 'Set Week' button appearing in the interface allowing you to set the level for weekly easily

disable-send-only-button.name: Disable Send Only Button
disable-send-only-button.description: Disable the small green 'Send Only' button appearing in the interface allowing you to only suggest the level and not actually rate it
